# add_subdirectory-compatible fragment — no project() call (FTR-1407)
# Wire generated per-context libraries into the consumer build.

if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../vessel_traffic/CMakeLists.txt)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../vessel_traffic vessel_traffic)
endif()

if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../cargo_operations/CMakeLists.txt)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../cargo_operations cargo_operations)
endif()

if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../passenger_terminal/CMakeLists.txt)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../passenger_terminal passenger_terminal)
endif()

if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../intermodal_transfer/CMakeLists.txt)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../intermodal_transfer intermodal_transfer)
endif()

if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../cargo_decomposition/CMakeLists.txt)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../cargo_decomposition cargo_decomposition)
endif()

if(EXISTS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../harbour_control/CMakeLists.txt)
    add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../harbour_control harbour_control)
endif()

# Aggregate interface target for consumer linking
add_library(muscovite_harbor_generated INTERFACE)
target_link_libraries(muscovite_harbor_generated INTERFACE
    vessel_traffic_dba
    cargo_operations_dba
    passenger_terminal_dba
    intermodal_transfer_dba
    cargo_decomposition_dba
    harbour_control_dba
)
